title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
